transactions.label: schedule-access-operations
transactions.transactionShape: single AccessManager.multicall; all operations scheduled atomically
transactions.idempotence: no-op only when the complete access state is finalized; refuses prior nonce history

transactions.label: cancel-or-restart-access-operations
transactions.transactionShape: Cancel aborts all remaining schedules atomically; Restart atomically cancels survivors and schedules the complete phase

transactions.label: execute-access-operations
transactions.transactionShape: single AccessManager.multicall; all operations preflighted and executed atomically
transactions.idempotence: no-op only when the complete access state is finalized and no live schedule remains

transactions.label: schedule-inactive-policy
transactions.transactionShape: single AccessManager.multicall; all operations scheduled atomically
transactions.idempotence: no-op only when all seven policy effects match; refuses prior nonce history

transactions.label: cancel-or-restart-policy-operations
transactions.transactionShape: Cancel aborts all remaining schedules atomically; Restart atomically cancels survivors and schedules the complete phase

transactions.label: execute-inactive-policy
transactions.transactionShape: single AccessManager.multicall; all operations preflighted and executed atomically
transactions.idempotence: no-op only when all seven policy effects match and no live schedule remains

transactions.label: prepare-atomic-setPhysicalDeliveryVault
transactions.requirement: approved smart-contract owner flow that pins and checks the V1 baseline in the same transaction as the mutation

transactions.label: schedule-strategy-activation
transactions.idempotence: no-op when active; refuses prior nonce history when inactive

transactions.label: cancel-or-restart-strategy-activation
transactions.transactionShape: Cancel aborts the live schedule; Restart atomically cancels a survivor and creates a new schedule with an incremented nonce

transactions.label: execute-strategy-activation
transactions.calldata: StrategyManager.resumeAllocation(adapter); does not rewrite caps or risk settings
transactions.idempotence: no-op when active and no live schedule remains
